sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Prudential (NYSE: PUK) AGM backs all resolutions after vote correction
feed.summary: Prudential plc announced that all resolutions put forth at its Annual General Meeting on May 28, 2026, were passed with strong shareholder majorities, following a correction to the total votes cast as a percentage of issued share capital. Shareholders approved the 2025 Annual Report, the revised Directors' Remuneration Policy, elected and re-elected directors, and renewed authorities for share allotment and buybacks. The company reported robust shareholder participation, with total votes cast representing 79.30% of the issued share capital.

feed.title: AbbVie (ABBV) Expands Venclyxto Label for Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia Treatment
feed.summary: AbbVie (ABBV) recently received European Commission approval to expand the label for its drug Venclyxto, allowing its use with acalabrutinib and ibrutinib for previously untreated adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL). While the company shows strong profitability and growth, indicated by a GF Score of 79/100, its high P/E ratio and recent insider selling activity may indicate potential overvaluation and warrant investor caution.

feed.title: Palomar’s earthquake reinsurance limit up to $3.92bn after June renewal
feed.summary: Palomar Holdings has completed its June 1st reinsurance placement, increasing its earthquake coverage to $3.92 billion and continental US hurricane coverage to $135 million. The company secured an additional $421 million in limit, including $360 million from its seventh Torrey Pines Re catastrophe bond. Palomar also raised its full-year 2026 adjusted net income guidance to $266 million–$280 million.

feed.title: Allegion plc stock (IE00BFRT3W74): shares edge higher after latest price move on NYSE
feed.summary: Allegion plc shares saw a modest upward move on the New York Stock Exchange on May 29, 2026, trading higher in regular session dealing. This keeps the Ireland-domiciled security business within its recent trading range ahead of the next earnings catalyst. The company's positioning in locks and access-control technologies makes valuation metrics like P/E and EV/EBITDA crucial for assessing the stock.

feed.title: RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX) Holds Steady As Earnings Estimates, Revenue Forecasts Signal Modest Growth
feed.summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX) is maintaining a steady performance, with analysts projecting modest growth in earnings and revenue. The company holds a Zacks Rank of No. 3 (Hold), indicating it is expected to perform in line with the broader market. Recent financial reports show RTX has consistently surpassed consensus EPS and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust stock hits 52-week high at $15.73
feed.summary: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust (PEB) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $15.73, marking a 67.8% appreciation over the past year and a 37.5% year-to-date return. This surge follows strong Q1 2026 earnings, outperforming revenue and EPS forecasts, and an upgrade to "Buy" from Truist Securities with an increased price target of $17.00. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock remains undervalued despite its recent gains.

feed.title: [144] TAKE TWO INTERACTIVE SOFTWARE INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. (TTWO) regarding the proposed sale of securities. The filing indicates a sale of 131 common shares with an aggregate market value of $28,592.06 through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on NASDAQ, stemming from restricted stock vesting. The document also includes standard SEC Form 144 disclosures and past SEC filings and news for the company.

feed.title: Duke Energy Florida implements third rate reduction to lower residential customer bills by approximately 25% in 2026
feed.summary: Duke Energy Florida is implementing its third rate reduction of 2026, which will lower residential customer bills by approximately 25% (or $50 per 1,000 kWh) from June through September. This reduction includes savings from the early removal of storm cost recovery charges, a March decrease for higher energy use periods, and a "true up" of storm costs. The company also highlights other savings initiatives like efficiency improvements in natural gas plants and the passing on of Inflation Reduction Act tax credits.

feed.title: Intel Corp Stock (INTC) Opened Up by 4.06% on May 29: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Intel Corp (INTC) stock rose by 4.06% on May 29, outperforming its sector. This increase is attributed to recent product innovations like the Arc G-Series processors, potential foundry deals with major tech companies, and strong Q1 2026 financial results driven by demand in artificial intelligence. Despite some analyst concerns about valuation and competition, the company's turnaround strategy and positive outlook are boosting investor confidence.

feed.title: International Business Machines Corp Stock (IBM) Opened Up by 4.46% on May 29: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: International Business Machines (IBM) stock surged 4.46% today due to strategic announcements including a $10 billion investment in quantum computing and a $5 billion commitment to open-source software security through Project Lightwell. Analysts responded positively, raising price targets and highlighting IBM's strong financial performance and efforts to "future-proof" the company through critical emerging technologies. The company also reaffirmed its 2026 outlook with a projected 5% revenue growth.

feed.title: Qualcomm Inc Stock (QCOM) Opened Up by 3.48% on May 29: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) stock rose 3.48% on May 29, primarily driven by strategic moves into AI, including a deal to supply custom AI chips to ByteDance and the launch of the Snapdragon C Platform for AI-enabled laptops. Despite positive developments, the stock experienced intraday volatility due to mixed guidance, concerns over Android smartphone demand, and some analyst caution regarding short-term outlook and valuation. Technical indicators show a buy signal with a MACD of 19.01, though some market sentiment remains bearish.

feed.title: Mathew Watson (BBY) sells 3,298 shares for $211,136 under Rule 144
feed.summary: Mathew Watson, an insider at Best Buy Co Inc (BBY), sold 3,298 shares of common stock for $211,135.64 on March 23, 2026, as detailed in a Form 144 SEC filing. The sale followed a stock option exercise on March 11, 2025. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC handled the transaction, which is publicly disclosed under Rule 144 regulations.

feed.title: IBM, Salesforce Share Gains Contribute To Dow's 225-Point Climb
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 225 points, primarily driven by gains in IBM and Salesforce shares. IBM's stock increased by 1.6% while Salesforce saw a 1.2% rise, contributing significantly to the index's upward movement.

feed.title: AMETEK Inc stock (US0311001004): steady trading ahead of next catalysts
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc. (US0311001004) stock traded steadily on the NYSE, in line with the broader U.S. industrials sector on May 29, 2026, as investors continued to process the company's May quarterly earnings and outlook. The stock's performance reflects a market weighing the company's financial figures and forward-looking commentary within the context of U.S. industrial and technology-linked cyclicals. Future investor focus will likely be on upcoming company updates, sector data, and macro indicators to confirm or challenge current valuation assumptions.

feed.title: SK telecom surges past KT on AI-driven stock rally
feed.summary: SK telecom has significantly outpaced its rival KT Corporation in market value this year, primarily driven by investor excitement over artificial intelligence. While KT's stock gained only 1.17%, SK telecom's shares surged 81.80% year-to-date, reversing an earlier market capitalization lead held by KT. Analysts attribute SK telecom's strong performance and future growth potential to its advancements in AI-related businesses, physical AI, and quantum cryptography communications, with expectations of robust earnings in the coming quarters.

feed.title: Blackstone Is About to Take a 54% Loss on Iconic Seattle Tower
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. is selling the US Bank Center in Seattle for approximately $280 million, representing a 54% loss from its original purchase price seven years ago. This deal highlights the growing trend of commercial landlords accepting significant losses in the current real estate market. Spear Street Capital is reportedly the buyer, though the deal's closure depends on financing.

feed.title: What To Do After Dell's Breakout Boosted Hewlett-Packard Enterprise Stock (NYSE:HPE)
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (HPE) is rated a Buy due to surging AI/server demand and networking momentum, benefiting from Dell's strong earnings and subsequent analyst upgrades. Citi raised its price target for HPE to $39, citing similar tailwinds in AI and server markets. The author plans to upgrade HPE to a Strong Buy if upcoming quarterly results are robust and shares avoid profit-taking sell-offs.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences Corp. Hits New 52-Week High at USD 87.93
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences Corp. (EW) has reached a new 52-week high of USD 87.93, highlighting its strong position in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector with a market capitalization of approximately USD 49,952 million. Despite a modest 1.67% performance increase over the past year and a 0.00% dividend yield, the company demonstrates a strong balance sheet with a low debt-to-equity ratio and high management efficiency, reflected in its 15.23% return on equity. This milestone underscores EW's ongoing performance trajectory in a competitive market.

feed.title: Wells Fargo maintains DR Horton (DHI) overweight recommendation
feed.summary: This system-generated article indicates that Wells Fargo has reiterated its "overweight" rating for DR Horton (DHI). No additional details or analysis are provided within the content.

feed.title: 4flow named a leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™
feed.summary: 4flow has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Specialist Supply Chain Strategy, Planning and Operations Consulting. CEO Kai Althoff and COO Sören Hagen highlighted the company's 25-year history of digital innovation and its end-to-end approach to supply chain optimization, emphasizing their commitment to delivering measurable, lasting value for customers through customized solutions and AI-powered methodologies.

feed.title: Lumber company penalized after fatal Alberta mill incident
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company Limited has been ordered to pay $355,000 to Northwestern Polytechnic after pleading guilty to a charge under Alberta’s OHS Act following the fatal striking of a worker in 2023. The funds will support the Northern Industrial Safety Pathways Program, a three-year pilot project providing safety training and tuition support for new workers in several industrial sectors. This initiative aims to prevent similar incidents in the future.

feed.title: Roofing Reality Check: Risk Is Rising Even in Quiet Storm Years
feed.summary: A new report from Verisk indicates that despite a decline in overall claims volume in 2025, residential roof replacement and repair costs significantly increased, driven by everyday wind and hail events. The report, "The 2026 Verisk U.S. Roof Report," highlights that hail volatility, aging roofs, and localized weather patterns are contributing to higher risk and costs for U.S. insurance, construction, and housing markets, making roof risk more expensive and less predictable.

feed.title: Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) Given New $120.00 Price Target at Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial raised its price target for Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) to $120.00 from $100.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, following Okta's recent strong quarterly results that surpassed expectations in both EPS and revenue. Multiple other research firms have also adjusted their price targets for the identity and access management solutions provider. Insider transactions show both sales and acquisitions of company stock, while institutional investors have actively adjusted their positions in Okta.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Trimble to $79 From $103, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has updated its price target for Trimble (TRMB) to $79, a decrease from the previous $103, while reaffirming its Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst activities and company announcements. Trimble specializes in technology and software solutions for various industries including construction, agriculture, and transportation.

feed.title: AMETEK Inc. stock (US0311001004): shares ease after recent highs as investors eye valuation metrics
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc. shares have eased slightly after reaching new highs in 2026, prompting investors to focus on valuation metrics despite strong quarterly results and consistent demand for its industrial technology products. The company reported impressive earnings per share and revenue growth, exceeding analyst expectations, and continues to benefit from its exposure to specialized industrial applications. While a recent insider transaction was an internal restructuring, the stock's year-to-date increase has led to discussions about its valuation relative to earnings and cash flow, especially given its premium pricing compared to industry peers.

feed.title: What Truist Financial (TFC)'s US$1.5 Billion Senior Notes Redemption Means For Shareholders
feed.summary: Truist Financial (TFC) announced the early redemption of $1.5 billion of senior notes due 2027, highlighting proactive balance sheet management and funding mix adjustments. This move, combined with the new Series S Preferred Stock terms, reflects the bank's evolving capital choices as it invests in digital growth and Sunbelt expansion. While loan growth and expense control are critical near-term drivers, investors should consider how these actions impact capital structure and the bank's capacity for strategic investments.

feed.title: CoStar to buy Zonda from MidOcean Partners
authors: Brooklee Han and HousingWire Automation News
feed.summary: CoStar Group has agreed to acquire Zonda, a North America-focused data, marketplace, and software platform for the new-home ecosystem, from private equity firm MidOcean Partners for an undisclosed sum. This acquisition will expand CoStar's presence in the residential real estate market, building on its dominant position in commercial real estate data. Zonda's offerings include subscription-based data, new-home marketplaces like NewHomeSource and Livabl, and workflow software, serving over 3,000 customers in the homebuilding industry. The deal is expected to close in the second half of 2026.

feed.title: Parke Bancorp Insider Sold Shares Worth $347,710, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at Parke Bancorp sold shares valued at $347,710, as reported in a recent SEC filing. The article, published by MT Newswires, provides details of this transaction and other recent news concerning Parke Bancorp, such as its authorization of a buyback plan and an increase in its cash dividend.

feed.title: Omnicom Group Inc. stock (US6819191064): shares steady as investors digest latest earnings and divid
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (OMC) shares traded steadily on the NYSE on May 29, 2026, as investors evaluated the advertising group's April 2026 quarterly results, latest dividend declaration, and cash-return strategy. The company affirmed its commitment to shareholder returns through regular cash dividends and opportunistic share repurchases, based on its Q1 2026 financial figures. Market participants continued to assess Omnicom’s performance within broader global advertising spending trends, with its valuation reflecting expectations for steady cash flow and capital return.

feed.title: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth on Strait of Hormuz Dangers and Shipowner Decisions - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth discusses the ongoing dangers in the Strait of Hormuz, noting persistent attacks on vessels and Chevron's refusal to pay tolls. He emphasizes that the decision to navigate the strait rests with shipowners and their insurers, who must regain confidence for oil trade to normalize, independent of any US-Iran peace agreement. Wirth confirms Chevron has six chartered ships in the region and highlights the need for owners to be willing to redeploy vessels after past incidents.

feed.title: Japan Post affiliate trims AFLAC (AFL) stake with 11,400-share sale
feed.summary: An affiliate of Japan Post Holdings Co., Ltd. has sold 11,400 shares of AFLAC common stock through open-market transactions on May 27, 2026. The sales were executed in three blocks at weighted average prices ranging from $114.86 to $116.74 per share. These shares are held indirectly by Japan Post through the J&A Alliance Trust, and the transactions were reported in a Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Is WEC Energy Group (WEC) Fairly Priced After Recent Steady Share Performance?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether WEC Energy Group (WEC) stock is fairly priced, utilizing two valuation approaches: the Dividend Discount Model (DDM) and Price vs Earnings (P/E). The DDM suggests WEC is slightly undervalued by 3.3%, while the P/E ratio indicates it is trading higher than industry averages but below Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio. Overall, the analysis suggests WEC is currently in the "about right" to "undervalued" range.

feed.title: Planet Labs (PL) Wins John Deere Supplier Sustainability Award For Emissions And Social Performance
feed.summary: Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL) has received a John Deere Supplier Sustainability Award 2025, specifically for its performance in emissions, product circularity, and social improvement. The company was recognized for providing satellite data that aids John Deere's agriculture technology development, supporting operational efficiency and sustainability. This award highlights the increasing collaboration between satellite data providers and large industrial companies to achieve corporate sustainability goals.

feed.title: Vår Energi deploys SLB’s Delfi platform for NCS well and field development planning
feed.summary: Vår Energi has expanded its digital collaboration with SLB, deploying the Delfi platform to enhance well and integrated field development planning across its Norwegian Continental Shelf operations. This cloud-native environment connects various stages from exploration to production, allowing teams to work concurrently with shared data and standardized workflows. The initiative aims to reduce cycle times, improve decision-making, and sustain production from mature offshore assets.

feed.title: How Humana’s New Orlando CenterWell Mail Hub May Reframe Its Pharmacy Ambitions (HUM)
feed.summary: Humana Inc. has launched a new $83 million CenterWell Pharmacy mail-order distribution center in Orlando, capable of processing 64,000 prescriptions daily. This facility aims to expand CenterWell’s payer-agnostic mail-order capabilities beyond Humana members, supporting direct-to-consumer and direct-to-employer partnerships. The expansion is seen as supporting Humana's growth strategy through CenterWell, though near-term challenges for Medicare Advantage margins and medical costs persist.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) expands unsecured revolver to $1B through 2031
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies has secured a new Amended and Restated Credit Agreement, expanding its unsecured revolving credit facility to $1 billion, up from $700 million, and extending its maturity to May 28, 2031. This facility, which was undrawn at closing, enhances the company's liquidity and financial flexibility for general corporate purposes, including acquisitions and capital expenditures. The agreement includes an uncommitted accordion feature and interest rates tied to Tyler's total net leverage ratio.

feed.title: Ship attacks continue in Strait of Hormuz despite peace talks, Chevron says
feed.summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth stated that despite ongoing peace talks, several vessels have been attacked in the Strait of Hormuz recently, highlighting persistent risks for shipowners in the Persian Gulf. Wirth emphasized that Chevron would not pay tolls for passage and that shipowners and insurers must be comfortable with safety before trade can normalize. The attacks, some unreported, indicate that even with a potential peace accord, the economic and operational challenges for oil transit remain significant.

feed.title: Five things to check before hitting the hayfield
feed.summary: As hay season approaches, John Deere's marketing manager Kaylene Ballesteros emphasizes five critical checks for hay balers to ensure efficiency and high-quality bales. These include inspecting wear parts, ensuring smooth crop flow, preparing the wrap system, dialing in perfect bale settings, and customizing technology tools. Additionally, it is important not to overlook the baling tractor and to plan ahead with your dealer.

feed.title: Chevron (NYSE: CVX) Chief Legal Officer to retire in 2027
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation announced that its Chief Legal Officer, R. Hewitt Pate, will resign effective December 31, 2026, in connection with his planned retirement in June 2027. Pate will remain with Chevron as a non-executive senior advisor until his retirement to ensure a smooth transition of his responsibilities. This information was disclosed in an 8-K filing, signaling a key personnel change within the company's governance.

feed.title: The Gross Law Firm Reminds Phreesia, Inc. Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit With a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of July 13, 2026 - PHR
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is notifying shareholders of Phreesia, Inc. (NYSE: PHR) about a pending class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased shares between May 8, 2025, and March 30, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm regarding potential lead plaintiff appointment, with a deadline of July 13, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Phreesia made misleading statements concerning its slowing demand and reduced visibility in key revenue streams, particularly weakened pharmaceutical marketing commitments, which led to a significant stock price decline after reduced revenue growth projections were announced.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Industrial Goods Companies: Performance Shipping (PSHG), Dycom (DY) and Fortune Brands Innovations (FBIN)
feed.summary: Analysts have provided insights into several Industrial Goods companies. Maxim Group reiterated a Buy rating for Performance Shipping (PSHG) with a $5.00 price target. B. Riley Securities maintained a Buy rating on Dycom (DY) with a price target of $625.00, while Truist Financial maintained a Hold rating on Fortune Brands Innovations (FBIN).

feed.title: Palomar Holdings raises 2026 guidance on reinsurance renewal By Investing.com
feed.summary: Palomar Holdings has raised its full-year 2026 adjusted net income guidance after successfully completing its reinsurance programs. The company secured significantly increased coverage for earthquake and hurricane events, including substantial capacity through catastrophe bond issuances. This move follows strong financial results for Q1 2026 and positions the company favorably within the insurance sector.

feed.title: The Gross Law Firm Reminds Pinterest, Inc. Investors of the Pending Class Action Lawsuit With a Lead Plaintiff Deadline of May 29, 2026 - PINS
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is alerting Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) investors about a pending class action lawsuit with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 29, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Pinterest made materially false and misleading statements regarding its revenues from advertising partners, its ability to manage the impact of U.S. tariffs, and an impending restructuring. Shareholders who purchased PINS shares between February 7, 2025, and February 12, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Parke Bancorp (PKBK) director sells 11,000 shares after option exercise
feed.summary: Parke Bancorp director Arret F. Dobson exercised stock options for 13,500 shares at $12.29 each and subsequently sold 11,000 shares at $31.61 per share. Post-transaction, Dobson directly holds 108,143 shares of common stock, in addition to restricted stock units and various other stock options. This insider activity indicates a partial realization of gains from option exercise.

feed.title: Bristol Myers posts Phase 3 win for multiple myeloma drug
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb announced positive results from a late-stage trial for its multiple myeloma drug candidate, mezigdomide. When used as part of a combination regimen, mezigdomide improved cancer-free survival by over 50%. This represents a significant win for the company in the blood cancer treatment sector.

feed.title: AI takes on brain cancer: how NeOnc targets the blood-brain barrier
feed.summary: NeOnc Technologies Holdings (NASDAQ: NTHI) is emerging as a key player in the biotech sector, leveraging AI to overcome the blood-brain barrier for treating aggressive brain cancers like glioblastoma. The company focuses on innovative drug delivery systems and neuro-oncology, aiming to transform CNS therapy by designing smarter and more precise treatment methods. This approach positions NeOnc within the growing trend of "platform biotech models," attracting investor interest in its potential for scalable therapeutic solutions.

feed.title: Charles Schwab (NYSE: CASH) reports proposed insider share sale
feed.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. has filed a Form 144 notice disclosing proposed insider sales of common stock. The filing lists proposed sale dates of February 26, 2026, February 26, 2025, and March 1, 2024, with corresponding amounts of 1,650, 1,950, and 2,950 shares, respectively. These proposed sales are tied to prior compensation dates and do not indicate immediate corporate actions, with actual sale completion subject to future transaction reports.

feed.title: How Sysco is preparing to feed hundreds of thousands of Houston visitors for FIFA World Cup
feed.summary: Sysco is increasing its inventory to prepare for the surge in visitors expected during the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Houston. The company anticipates a 10% to 20% increase in June and July volumes for popular items like brisket, chicken wings, and french fries to accommodate hundreds of thousands of extra pounds of food.

feed.title: Supreme Court veteran Scott Keller to steer Chevron’s legal fights
feed.summary: Chevron Corporation has announced the appointment of Scott A. Keller as its new general counsel, effective July 1. Keller, a distinguished appellate and constitutional lawyer, will report to current Chief Legal Officer R. Hewitt Pate, who is set to retire in mid-2027. Upon Pate's retirement, Keller will assume the role of chief legal officer, leading Chevron's global legal affairs.

feed.title: Hasbro Has to Figure Out D&D Without Larian
feed.summary: Hasbro is investing one billion dollars into single-player Dungeons and Dragons games, including a desire for Baldur's Gate 4, following the massive success of Baldur's Gate 3. However, Larian Studios, the developer behind BG3, has opted to pursue other projects, leaving Hasbro in search of a new studio. The article suggests Hasbro could consider forming its own in-house development team, leveraging the large pool of experienced developers affected by recent industry layoffs, to maintain creative control and build player trust.
